basicDetails.implementingAgency: Department Of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government Of Meghalaya

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme ‘Maintenance of Horti Hubs” was launched by the Department of Agriculture &amp; Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya to procure good quality disease-free and commercially accepted varieties of the identified flowers &amp; multiply and to serve as a demonstration cum training ground for those who are interested in Floriculture and who intend to make this as their means of livelihood.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
> **Pattern of Assistance:**

Organizing demonstration cum training on hi-tech floriculture for farmers who are interested in floriculture, and renovation/repairing of old hubs.
> **Type of Assistance:**

Demonstration and Training
schemeContent.briefDescription: The objective of the scheme is to procure good quality disease-free and commercially accepted varieties of the identified flowers and multiply and, to serve as a demonstration cum training ground for those who are interested in Floriculture and who intend to make this as their means of livelihood.

children.text: The scheme ‘Maintenance of Horti Hubs” was launched by the Department of Agriculture & Farmers’ Welfare, Government of Meghalaya to procure good quality disease-free and commercially accepted varieties of the identified flowers & multiply and to serve as a demonstration cum training ground for those who are interested in Floriculture and who intend to make this as their means of livelihood.
Organizing demonstration cum training on hi-tech floriculture for farmers who are interested in floriculture, and renovation/repairing of old hubs.
The eligible bonafide farmer can apply/write an application on plain paper.
Along with the application, attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application along with the documents at your nearest office of the Horticulture Development Officer of a CD Block/Horticulture Circle.
The eligible bonafide farmers shall be selected on a first come first serve basis.
Below officials can be contacted for any concerns or queries:

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **Application Process:**

**Step 01:** The eligible bonafide farmer can apply/write an application on plain paper.
**Step 02:** Along with the application, attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
**Step 03:** Submit the duly filled and signed application along with the documents at your nearest office of the Horticulture Development Officer of a CD Block/Horticulture Circle.
> **Mode of Selection of Beneficiary(s):**

The eligible bonafide farmers shall be selected on a first come first serve basis.
> **Whom to Contact:** Below officials can be contacted for any concerns or queries:


  - [District Horticulture Officer](https://megagriculture.gov.in/PUBLIC/contacts_horticulture.aspx)  - Horticulture Development Officer

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicants should be a permanent resident of Meghalaya.
1. The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.
1. The applicant/farmer should own or lease land of at least 0.2 hectares or more.

children.text: The applicants should be a permanent resident of Meghalaya.
The applicant should be a bonafide farmer engaged in agriculture.
The applicant/farmer should own or lease land of at least 0.2 hectares or more.
